mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT INST_CD AS instCd ,INST_CD_NM AS instCdNm ,INST_DSTNCTN_VAL AS instDstnctnVal ,INST_CD_DESC AS instCdDesc ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBEXTRNLINSTCD WHERE 1=1
AND INST_CD like CONCAT('%',#{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND INST_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{instCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND INST_DSTNCTN_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{instDstnctnVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND INST_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{instCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by INST_CD, INST_DSTNCTN_VAL ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBEXTRNLINSTCD WHERE 1=1
AND INST_CD like CONCAT('%',#{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND INST_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{instCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND INST_DSTNCTN_VAL like CONCAT('%',#{instDstnctnVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND INST_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{instCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT INST_CD AS instCd ,INST_CD_NM AS instCdNm ,INST_DSTNCTN_VAL AS instDstnctnVal ,INST_CD_DESC AS instCdDesc FROM TBEXTRNLINSTCD WHERE INST_CD = #{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND INST_DSTNCTN_VAL = #{instDstnctnVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
